entries.name: Useful Supplies
entries.description: Rations, rope, lamp oil, chalk, parchment or other practical gear.

entries.name: Local Coin
entries.description: A modest purse of mixed coinage or trade tokens.

entries.name: Rumour Object
entries.description: A map scrap, signet, symbol or letter pointing toward a local mystery.

entries.name: Unusual Trinket
entries.description: A small item with regional flavour and possible story value.

entries.name: Minor Magical Curiosity
entries.description: A low-power magical item, charm or consumable with a drawback or mystery.
